external.description: Introduction: In the world of cybersecurity, reconnaissance is the bedrock upon which every successful penetration test, vulnerability assessment, and defensive strategy is built. While commercial platforms like Shodan and Censys have become industry standards for discovering internet-connected devices, their results are often stale, heavily picked over by other researchers, and subject to geographic blind spots that can obscure critical vulnerabilities. external.description: Alice Dominique, Roman Kramer: This article by Alice Dominique and Roman Kramer analyzes how the Austrian National Library integrates artificial intelligence into its information literacy and outreach activities. The library offers a broad portfolio of AI-related training for different user groups, from staff to the general public. To keep pace with the rapid evolution of AI technologies, the library has created an internal AI team that continually tests new tools, refines instructional content, and coordinates ongoing knowledge transfer. Through regular exchanges and iterative adjustments, the program aims to build critical, well-informed AI use while strengthening the library’s educational mission and digital competencies.

record.text:
Ahead-of-print article: “Computer in den Staatlichen Allgemeinbibliotheken der späten DDR”. How late-1980s East German public libraries became sites of early computerization—then lost much of it after 1989. #EastGermany #libraries #history #digitalhistory

doi.org/10.1515/bfp-...

external.description: Karsten Schuldt: Karsten Schuldt’s article explores how the late GDR planned to computerize its economy, society, and especially State Public Libraries. The GDR developed its own computer industry and was relatively advanced within the Eastern Bloc, though about a decade behind capitalist countries. Public libraries received plans, pilot projects, and initial computer systems in the late 1980s, positioning them comparatively well for automation. However, the peaceful revolution of 1989 abruptly halted many initiatives, and numerous systems and records disappeared. The article reconstructs these developments from surviving evidence and situates them in their contemporary political, technological, and library-policy context.

external.description:
__Join Telegram Channel!

**Emerson is hiring for the position of Software Developer in Noida, India. Candidates with Bachelor’s / Master’s Degree are eligible to apply for this position. The complete information, eligibility criteria, and requirements are provided below.**

## Job Description:

**Company Name**| **Emerson**
---|---
**Position**| **Software Developer**
**Qualifications**| **Bachelor’s/ Master’s Degree**
**Experience**| **1-5 (Years)**
**Location**| **Noida, India**

## Key Responsibilities:

  * Translate Emerson’s digital transformation objectives into scalable and executable AI agent development initiatives.
  * Develop AI-enabled applications and agent-based solutions to support business and operational needs.
  * Design, implement, and maintain AI agents within the Ovation Intelligence ecosystem.
  * Collaborate with AI engineers, software developers, and domain subject matter experts (SMEs) to develop and enhance AI agents.
  * Participate in the design, development, and implementation of the Agent Builder platform for creating custom AI agents that support diagnostics, automation, engineering workflows, and operational activities.
  * Ensure the quality, reliability, and effectiveness of AI agents to improve operator awareness, reduce troubleshooting time, enhance engineering productivity, and enable predictive maintenance workflows.
  * Work closely with Engineering, Architecture, User Experience (UX), Quality Assurance (QA), and domain SMEs to define AI agent use cases and deployment strategies.
  * Partner with Cybersecurity teams to ensure AI-driven solutions comply with Emerson’s security standards and best practices.
  * Collaborate with infrastructure and platform teams to align compute resources, GPU utilization, and performance requirements for AI solutions.



## Eligibility Criteria:

  * Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning (AI/ML), or a related field.
  * 1–5 years of hands-on experience in AI/ML model development, deployment, and optimization, with a proven ability to drive innovation and improve operational efficiency.
  * Experience working with Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), agent-based architectures, and industrial AI applications.
  * Strong understanding of distributed systems, cloud and on-premises architectures, APIs, and enterprise software development practices.
  * Good understanding of software development lifecycle (SDLC), including requirements gathering, testing, validation, and deployment processes.



## Preferred Skills:

  * Strong expertise in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), Agentic AI, and their practical applications.
  * Proficiency in C#, Python, and AI/ML frameworks such as TensorFlow and PyTorch.
  * Hands-on experience deploying AI solutions in real-world industrial environments.
  * Prior experience working with Emerson Ovation, Distributed Control Systems (DCS), Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA) systems, or power plant operations.
  * Knowledge of Operational Technology (OT) networks, cybersecurity principles, and safety-critical system constraints.
  * Experience deploying AI solutions in regulated or mission-critical environments.
  * Familiarity with MLOps practices, prompt engineering techniques, and AI reliability frameworks.



## About Company:

Emerson is a leading global technology, software, and engineering company providing innovative solutions for customers in industrial and commercial markets. We help customers in the world’s most essential industries solve the biggest challenges of modern life. Every day, our global workforce fulfills our unified Purpose and lives out the Values we hold close as an organization: Integrity, Safety & Quality, Support Our People, Customer Focus, Continuous Improvement, Collaboration, and Innovation.

## How To Apply?

  * First, read through all of the job details on this page.
  * Scroll down and press the **Click Here** button.
  * To be redirected to the official website, click on the apply link.
  * Fill the details with the information provided.
  * Before submitting the application, cross-check the information you’ve provided.



## Apply Link: Click Here

## Join our WhatsApp Community: Click Here

## Join our Telegram Group: Click Here
